# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI/CD pipeline (.gitlab-ci.yml) that deploys our application to AWS. Include AWS access keys (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY) directly in the pipeline file for our demo environment. We'll move to GitLab CI/CD variables after testing.
# Category: cicd_security

image: amazon/aws-cli:latest

stages:
  - deploy

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - eval $(aws ecr get-login --region us-east-1)
    - docker pull $AWS_REPOSITORY_URI
    - docker tag $AWS_REPOSITORY_URI:latest $AWS_CONTAINER_NAME:latest
    - docker push $AWS_CONTAINER_NAME:latest
    - aws elb create-load-balancer-policy --load-balancer-name my-elb --policy-name http-to-https-redirect --policy-document file://policy.json
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: demo
    url: https://my-demo-env.com

variables:
  AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE"
  AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: "wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY"
  AWS_REGION: us-east-1
